summary: Bug fix verification for Playing XI extraction - ALL 10 unit tests PASSED. Live API endpoints working correctly with proper XI filtering (11 players per team, Pat Cummins correctly excluded from playing XI).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playing XI extraction bug is FIXED. The parse_fixture() function in sportmonks_service.py now correctly: (1) Uses pivot-based team_id + substitution parsing, (2) Falls back to scorecard-based resolution for unassigned players, (3) Prunes oversized XI using confirmed player IDs, (4) Hard caps at 12 players per team. The _filter_squads_to_playing_xi() in server.py also enforces the 12-player cap. Live match endpoint returns exactly 11 players per team in playing_xi arrays.

POST /api/matches/{match_id}/fetch-live.result: PASSED - Returns correct playing XI (11 per team)
POST /api/matches/{match_id}/fetch-live.verification: Pat Cummins NOT in playing XI (correct behavior)

bug_verification.original_bug: Claude was evaluating non-playing squad members (e.g., Pat Cummins) because Playing XI was not properly filtered from live API response
